t.p: Can't find what you're looking for?

img.style: max-width:190px; border-radius:var(--L-radius); box-shadow:var(--L-shadow-lg); border:2px solid var(--L-border);

h1.style: font-family:'Lora',serif; font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--L-text) !important; margin-bottom:0.5rem; letter-spacing:-0.02em;

i.t-attf-class: bi bi-star-fill#{'' if star <= int(book.avg_rating + 0.5) else '-o'} lib-star#{'' if star <= int(book.avg_rating + 0.5) else '-o'}

t.t-value: 'padding:0.32rem 1rem 0.32rem 0; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:var(--L-muted) !important; white-space:nowrap;'

i.t-attf-class: bi bi-star-fill#{'' if star <= review.rating else '-o'}

div.div: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

label.style: display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.35rem; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500;

input.name: rating
input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if existing_review and existing_review.rating == r else ('checked' if not existing_review and r == 3 else None)

div.style: border:1.5px solid var(--L-border); border-radius:var(--L-radius); overflow:hidden; height:80vh; background:var(--L-white); box-shadow:var(--L-shadow);

div.div: Borrow some books to get personalised recommendations!

textarea.name: reason
textarea.placeholder: Reason for request (e.g. Required for my course)

p.style: color:var(--L-muted) !important; display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1.5rem; font-size:0.875rem;

div.p: Please review your booking details before confirming.

div.style: background:var(--L-white); border:1.5px solid var(--L-border); border-radius:var(--L-radius); padding:1.25rem; box-shadow:var(--L-shadow-sm);

div.p: This action cannot be undone. Your booking will be cancelled immediately.

div.style: margin:0 1.5rem 1.5rem; background:#F9FAFB; border:1.5px solid #F9FAFB; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden;
display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:0.6rem 1rem; border-bottom:1px solid #fee2e2;
display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:0.6rem 1rem; border-bottom:1px solid #fee2e2;
